title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Incident Case: Net Ipv4 Binary Mask
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net ipv4 binary mask increment in a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Convert IPv4 octets and masks between binary and dotted decimal and explain contiguous prefix bits.
Compare three-tier, collapsed-core, and spine-leaf architectures plus north-south and east-west traffic.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
